brand_dna.category: Better-for-you hydration soda: sparkling flavored cans with electrolytes and organic honey, positioned as a new beverage category.
brand_dna.core_belief: You don't have to choose between great flavor and feeling great - soda can taste amazing and hydrate at the same time.
proof_points: 180mg essential electrolytes per can (sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium)
Sweetened entirely with 100% organic wildflower honey, no artificial sweeteners
Only 45 calories per can, caffeine-free and gluten-free
Free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives (no sucralose, aspartame, stevia, or HFCS)
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, playful challenger to both sugary soda and clinical sports drinks - flavor-first, better-for-you, born in San Diego.

voice_pillars.name: Flavor-First Fun
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with taste and enjoyment, treating hydration as the bonus rather than the pitch.
voice_pillars.quote: Soda That Tastes Amazing. Hydration Built In.

voice_pillars.name: No-Compromise Honest
voice_pillars.desc: Frames the product as the answer to a real tradeoff, staying plain-spoken about ingredients and benefits.
voice_pillars.quote: You don't have to choose between great flavor and feeling great.

voice_pillars.name: Active Striver Energy
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to movers and doers chasing what's next, with an upbeat, motion-driven tone.
voice_pillars.quote: made for the movers, the shakers, and the tastemakers

voice_pillars.name: Playful Escapism
voice_pillars.desc: Uses vivid, vacation-style imagery to make each flavor feel like an experience.
voice_pillars.quote: Tropical Recharge is vacation in a can.

phrases: Soda That Tastes Amazing. Hydration Built In.
Refreshment you can feel good about

icp: Active, health-aware adults who grew up loving soda but want cleaner ingredients and easy hydration, and will pay a premium for a flavor-first drink that fits their on-the-go lifestyle.

personas.name: The Everyday Striver
personas.description: Busy movers going from beaches to boardroom who want a fun soda that hydrates without the sugar crash - moved by the no-compromise, feel-good angle.

personas.name: Clean-Label Seeker
personas.description: Ingredient-conscious buyers who scan for no artificial sweeteners and low calories - moved by organic honey, 45 calories, and 'no sucralose, aspartame, or HFCS'.

personas.name: Active Refresher
personas.description: Yoga, run, and hike regulars looking for a tasty alternative to sports drinks - moved by 180mg electrolytes and before/during/after use cases.

offers: Free shipping on orders over $35 within the US
Subscribe & Save: 15% off every order, free shipping, early access to new flavors, flexible scheduling
First month Subscribe & Save price of $16.50 ($1.38 per can)
Variety Pack with 6 cans of each flavor

allowed.claim: 180mg essential electrolytes per can (sodium, potassium, magnesium, calcium)
Sweetened entirely with 100% organic wildflower honey, no artificial sweeteners
No sucralose, aspartame, stevia, or HFCS
Free from artificial flavors, colors, and preservatives

banned.claim: Boosts your immunity or immune system
banned.why: Banned immunity claim - not supported and prohibited for this category.
Unqualified 'detox' claim is banned for beverages.

banned.claim: Burns fat or aids weight loss
banned.why: Banned fat-burning/weight-loss claim with no substantiation.

banned.claim: Treats, cures, or prevents dehydration-related illness
Headline use of 'all natural' or 'clean' as a standalone promise
banned.why: 'Natural' and 'clean' are vague and risky as headline claims; keep tied to specific facts.

banned.claim: 'Low sugar' as a labeled nutrient-content claim
banned.why: Nutrient-content claims must match the actual label; only state verified per-can values like 45 calories.
